personal.name: Haidy Saied Tawfik
personal.title: Senior Software Test Engineer
personal.subtitle: QA Automation & AI Quality Engineer
personal.description: Building scalable test automation frameworks, QA platforms, and AI-powered testing solutions for web, mobile, and API applications. Specialized in ensuring precision through rigorous automation.

about.title: The Professional Persona
about.tagline: I am a Senior QA Automation Engineer with 3 years of experience with specialized focus on bridging the gap between traditional software quality and the emerging world of AI-integrated systems.
paragraphs: With deep expertise in Telecom, FinTech, ERP, and Sustainability sectors, I don't just 'find bugs'—I build infrastructure to prevent them. My approach combines the rigor of manual functional testing with the speed of advanced automation using Playwright, Selenium, and Appium.
Currently, I am pioneering AI-powered QA workflows, leveraging n8n, Large Language Models (LLMs), and prompt engineering to automate test case generation and optimize the entire testing lifecycle.

projects.title: QA Automation Hub
projects.description: Centralized dashboard for executing automation suites, tracking results, and integrating GitHub Actions workflows.

projects.title: AI-Powered Test Gen using n8n
projects.description: AI workflow that analyzes requirements and automatically generates test cases, reports, and QA documentation.

projects.title: Playwright Framework
projects.description: Scalable Playwright framework built with TypeScript and POM architecture for web and API automation.

projects.title: Vodafone e-shop Framework
projects.description: Selenium-Cucumber framework automating Vodafone eShop customer journeys and regression testing.

projects.title: Octo Mobile App
projects.description: QA automation for FinTech mobile and APIs using Selenium, Appium, and RestAssured.

experience.description: Leading automation strategy and quality assurance activities for web and mobile applications.
bullets: Lead QA strategy & automation pipelines for enterprise-scale sustainability web and mobile applications.
Engineered a custom, modular Playwright end-to-end testing framework from scratch using TypeScript and POM architecture.
Developed robust mobile automation suites using Appium and orchestrated parallel cross-device coverage.
Pioneering workflows utilizing n8n and LLM orchestration to generate automated test cases.
Conducted performance benchmarking with Apache JMeter, API validation (GraphQL), and SQL schema verification.
Designed and integrated a centralized QA Automation Hub with GitHub Actions for seamless continuous delivery.

experience.description: Contributed to the quality assurance and automation of Vodafone eShop, a large-scale telecom e-commerce platform.
bullets: Ensured high availability and exact customer journey flow for Vodafone eShop (high-traffic telecom e-commerce).
Developed robust web UI and checkout automation test scripts using Selenium Web Driver, Java, and Cucumber BDD.
Contributed to iOS mobile automation test suites using Appium to secure high-frequency releases.
Orchestrated manual end-to-end validation of complex customer purchase patterns and pricing algorithms.
Embedded thoroughly with cross-functional Agile teams to accelerate regression analysis and build stability.

experience.description: Performed quality assurance activities for ERP, CRM, and mobile applications serving beauty salon businesses.
bullets: Architected comprehensive manual and automated quality control activities for ERP and CRM SaaS applications.
Handled precise end-to-end REST API validation and integration checking cycles using Postman.
Spearheaded performance benchmarking, load, and scalability testing across backend services with JMeter.
Designed comprehensive test plans, validation matrices, and regression catalogs for mobile business apps.

experience.description: Worked on FinTech products covering web, mobile, and API platforms.
bullets: Validated complex multi-channel financial transactions, account ledgers, and secure payment integrations.
Built responsive functional web and mobile automation suites using Selenium and Appium.
Developed custom back-end integration test suites using RestAssured and Java.
Formulated optimized database regression verification layers using advanced SQL query validations.
Enforced rigorous security and performance testing using JMeter under strict sprint schedules.

contact.ctaText: Whether you're building a complex enterprise dashboard or a cutting-edge AI application, quality shouldn't be an afterthought. Let's talk about building your automation strategy.
